description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, deploy and a pre stage. Use the quay.io/podman/stable:v5.6.2 image (entrypoint disabled) for all build jobs, logging into the registry via podman login in a before_script. In the build stage define build:fedora:42, build:fedora:43, build:fedora:44 (allow_failure, manual), build:fedora:rawhide (allow_failure, manual), build:ubuntu:24.04, build:ubuntu:26.04 (allow_failure, manual) and build:linter; each runs its respective ./.gitlab/build_image.sh script or a podman build then podman push command. In the pre stage add lint:shellcheck using koalaman/shellcheck-alpine that runs "shellcheck --external-sources setup.sh $(find . -name '*.sh' -path '**/latest/**')". In the test stage add test:ansible:lint using the linter image to run "git config --global --add safe.directory $CI_PROJECT_DIR", "go-task ans:lint" and "yamllint -f parsable .", then test:fedora:42, test:fedora:43, test:fedora:44 (allow_failure, manual), test:fedora:rawhide (allow_failure, manual), test:ubuntu:24.04, test:ubuntu:26.04 (allow_failure, manual); each inherits the .test template to execute "id", "pwd", "ls -la", "stat .", a UID check for user 1010, "sudo chown -R 1010:1010 .", "sudo chmod -R go-w .", "./setup.sh", "./.gitlab/check_versions.bash" and "./.gitlab/verify_no_changes.sh". Finally, add deploy:github using registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:latest to install git and openssh, write the GITHUB_KEY files, add a GitHub remote and push the current branch, running only on the default branch; all jobs inherit rules that trigger on tags, the default branch, or merge requests, with manual or allow_failure where indicated.
